differences.justification: Removed in favor of using dashscope SDK 2.22.22's ResponseFormat.JsonSchemaFormat directly, as the SDK now provides built-in JSON schema support
Removed in favor of using dashscope SDK 2.22.22's ResponseFormat directly with its built-in jsonSchema field
Exposed intentionally by QwenScoringModel.setTextReRankParamCustomizer to allow customization of the dashscope SDK's TextReRankParam, consistent with the customizer setters on the other Qwen models
